title: GenomeLens 核型图
description: 用于在染色体尺度展示两个物种之间的共线性对应关系。它适合观察整条染色体或大片段之间的保守、断裂、重排与融合情况，是宏观结构比较的核心图型之一。
description_en: Displays chromosome-scale syntenic correspondences between two species. It is well suited for examining chromosome-wide or large-segment conservation, breaks, rearrangements, and fusion patterns, making it a core figure for macro-structural comparison.
context: 双物种染色体尺度共线性与结构变动展示。
context_en: Chromosome-scale synteny and structural variation display for two species.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 包含两物种注释与序列文件的目录，用于解析染色体轨道与长度信息。
params.description_en: Directory containing the annotation and sequence files for both species, used to resolve chromosome tracks and length information.

params.label: Blocks 文件
params.description: 双物种共线性区块文件，决定哪些染色体片段之间需要建立连接，是核型图结构关系的核心依据。
params.description_en: Pairwise synteny blocks file defining which chromosome segments should be connected. It is the core structural input for the karyotype figure.

params.label: 画布尺寸
params.description: 画布尺寸，例如 8x6；留空使用默认。
params.description_en: Figure size, e.g. 8x6; leave empty for default.
